disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Profound, persistent feeling of being cold for weeks, needing multiple layers indoors and still shivering with the heater on
trigger_question_examples: How have you been feeling in yourself over the past few weeks?
Have you been feeling the cold more than usual?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm frozen all the time — I've got the heater on full and I'm under blankets and I still can't get warm.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No bowel motion for ten days with a bloated, sore, distended abdomen and nausea; over-the-counter stimulant laxative had no effect
trigger_question_examples: When did you last open your bowels?
Is your tummy bloated or sore, and are you feeling sick?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's been ten whole days with nothing. My belly is bloated and sore and I feel queasy. I tried a senna laxative and it did absolutely nothing.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Unintentional weight gain of about 8 kg over a month despite a poor appetite
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've put on about 8 kilos in a month, which makes no sense because I've hardly been eating.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Overwhelming fatigue and lethargy that has left the patient housebound and unable to lift their head
trigger_question_examples: How is this affecting what you can do day to day?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can't do anything. I can't even lift my head off the pillow. I haven't been able to leave the house.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Carer reports the patient's voice has become deep and hoarse, speech has slowed, and the patient is apathetic and very slow to respond
trigger_question_examples: Has anyone noticed a change in the patient's voice, speech, or alertness?
Does the patient seem more slowed down or 'not themselves'?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Her voice has gone really deep and croaky, she talks so slowly now, and honestly she seems half out of it — really slow to answer.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: She's probably just worn out from not sleeping.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Feels her heart or pulse seems slow and sluggish; roommate can feel a slow pulse when asked to check
trigger_question_examples: Can your roommate feel your pulse at your wrist and count it for me?
Does your heartbeat feel slow or sluggish?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you mention it, my roommate counted my pulse and it does seem really slow.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I don't have anything to measure it with properly.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Skin is dry and coarse and hair has become brittle and thinning over recent weeks
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any changes in your skin or hair?
Has your skin felt drier or your hair more brittle than usual?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My skin has gone really dry and rough, and my hair feels brittle and seems to be thinning.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No prior thyroid or other diagnosis known to the patient; not on any prescribed medication
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any medical conditions or take any regular medicines?
Have you ever been told you have a thyroid problem or any other health condition?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I've never really been diagnosed with anything and I don't take any regular medications — just the senna I bought myself.
